arts.ttl: Chelsea told 'next level' deadline day transfer can guarantee Champions League next season
arts.sum: Chelsea have slipped back in their pursuit of a top four place, with a run of just one win in seven games, but Paul Merson believes a deadline day deal can give the Blues the boost theur need

arts.ttl: Palace agree deal with Chelsea for Chilwell loan
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have agreed a deal with Chelsea to sign Ben Chilwell on loan for rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund reach agreement with Chelsea for Carney Chukwuemeka
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have this evening reached an agreement with Chelsea to sign Carney Chukwuemeka (21) on loan for the remainder of the season, according to Patrick Berger. The Englishman will…

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca denies Gary Neville claim Cole Palmer was 'played' by Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Sky Sports pundit said post-match interaction didn’t “feel right”

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca looking forward to the end of January transfer window
arts.sum: Chelsea play on Monday, just hours before the transfer window deadline, with several players linked with exits from Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea agree to loan out player to Premier League club on deadline day
arts.sum: With there being 24 hours left of the January transfer window, it looks as if Chelsea have finally sparked into life when it comes to...

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man Utd in bombshell battle as Chelsea eye €90m deal: FT recap
arts.sum: Plus, Chelsea are interested in a wonderkid valued at €90 million and Aston Villa wrapped up a deal to sign Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford. However, within two hours, the deal had collapsed as Bayern rejected two bids, prompting the two clubs to stop the negotiations and seemingly leaving Arsenal in pole position to sign him.

arts.ttl: Chelsea strike transfer agreement as release clause set with deadline day medical booked
arts.sum: According to a fresh report, Chelsea have finalised a loan agreement for Carney Chukwuemeka to move to Borussia Dortmund for the remainder of the 2024/25 campaign. "Probably they're the first that will want to leave because they work every day because they want to play.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News Today: Palmer repeat takes shape as €200m raid planned
arts.sum: Chelsea are looking to sign another promising youngster from Man City. Chelsea have made a late enquiry over Man City youngster Nico O'Reilly, according to Fabrizio Romano.

arts.ttl: Axel Disasi to Tottenham: Ange Postecoglou breaks silence on Chelsea transfer 'agreement'
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou breaks his silence on claims that the Lilywhites have agreed a loan deal for Chelsea defender Axel Disasi.
